aliases.description: Search aliases from address, area, street, building, and manual classification.

propertyType.description: Retail category such as shophouse, mall retail, HDB retail, or suburban mall retail.

area.description: Primary area name used for search and display.

confidence.description: Coverage label based on official benchmark depth, asking-rent freshness, and classification certainty.

reason.description: Decision explanation for public and member views.

asking.description: Current asking rent estimate from listing or manual verified capture.

askingSourceStatus.description: Feed-state flag such as production-ready, pilot-manual-feed-connected, feed-record-missing, or pending-source.

askingSource.feedHealth.description: Normalized feed health state: production, pilot, or missing.

askingSource.fallbackUsed.description: True when direct asking-rent values are unavailable and benchmark/sample fallback is used.

gap.description: Percentage difference between asking rent and official benchmark.

daily.description: Daily public banner copy generated from official, asking, and historical series.

series.description: Historical official median versus asking median.

map.description: Map position and pressure status for prototype visualisation.

fairRange.description: RentIntel fair range generated from official benchmark and asking spread.

sourceSummary.description: Plain-language explanation of official benchmark, asking signal, and confidence limits.

members.description: Passwordless member list and access state.

login_codes.description: Short-lived login code records generated by backend.

watchlist_areas.description: Member area alerts and watchlist records.

alert_rules.description: Member alert trigger, target psf, gap limit, cadence, and condition records.

alert_deliveries.description: Queued, sent, skipped, failed, acknowledged, dead-letter, and suppressed member alert delivery records.

alert_delivery_runs.description: Delivery worker batch-run logs with sent, failed, skipped, and dead-letter totals.

alert_delivery_admin_log.description: Admin queue action history with from/to status transitions and retry metadata.

member_role_audit_log.description: Role governance history showing actor, target, previous role, next role, and reason.

notification_preferences.description: Member daily brief, activation, watchlist, and source-sync notification settings.

activation_requests.description: Waitlist-to-member activation and promo review requests.

asking_source_candidates.description: Member source candidates and public no-match coverage requests for pilot review.

source_sync_runs.description: Pilot and production asking-rent source sync run logs.

source_sync_schedule.description: Source sync cadence, run-hour policy, next-run timestamp, and last-run status.

source_freshness_policy.description: Freshness SLA thresholds for Fresh/Watch/Stale checks.

source_freshness_breach_events.description: Freshness transition events and queue-trigger context when the source drops below Fresh.

asking_source_production_evidence.description: Production asking-source evidence, QA log timestamp, source-owner review, source trust state, ops review stage, readiness gate, source exception alerts, release log, QA rows, and controlled-release status.

backend_handoff_audit.description: Generated backend payload readiness rows and handoff review history.
